message:
Running command: export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
SOC_CONFIG="$PROJECT_ROOT/config/soc_config.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

# Create a generation-time config with build_fw_smoke: false (toolchain not available)
GEN_CONFIG="/tmp/soc_config_gen.yaml"
python3 -c "
import yaml, re, sys

text = open('$SOC_CONFIG').read()
# Replace build_fw_smoke: true with build_fw_smoke: false
text = re.sub(r'(build_fw_smoke:\s*)true', r'\1false', text)
open('$GEN_CONFIG', 'w').write(text)
# Verify
cfg = yaml.safe_load(text)
v = cfg['generation']['build_fw_smoke']
print(f'build_fw_smoke in generation config: {v}')
assert v == False, 'Expected False!'
print('Generation config written: $GEN_CONFIG')
"

echo ""
echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate ==="
echo ""
echo "Effective command (generate = tool invocation, no subcommand):"
echo "  nc_chipgen \\"
echo "    --soc-config \"$GEN_CONFIG\" \\"
echo "    --out         \"$PROJECT_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --pdk-root    \"$PDK_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --nc-lib-root \"$NC_LIB_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --skip-synth"
echo ""

nc_chipgen \
    --soc-config "$GEN_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --skip-synth 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="

function.name: execute_bash
